  ?awardStatement pq:P585 ?awardDate .
  ?player wdt:P8695 ?debutYear .
}
GROUP BY ?player ?debutYear

  ?player p:P166 ?awardStatement.
  ?awardStatement ps:P166 wd:Q5200080.
